key.name: window-width
key.description: The width of the main window

key.name: window-height
key.description: The height of the main window

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the window is maximized

key.name: initiative-level
key.description: Controls how proactive the semantic-driven agents are

key.name: initiative-score-threshold
key.description: Minimum score required for agent to take initiative (0.0-1.0)

key.name: enable-reflexion
key.description: Allow agents to reflect on and improve their responses

key.name: max-agent-memory-mb
key.description: Maximum memory allocation per agent in MB

key.name: agent-cpu-quota
key.description: CPU quota percentage for agents

key.name: browser-semantic-mode
key.description: Enable AI-powered semantic understanding in browser

key.name: browser-privacy-level
key.description: Privacy protection level for AI browser

key.name: browser-auto-summarize
key.description: Automatically generate page summaries

key.name: task-auto-planning
key.description: Allow agents to automatically plan and break down tasks

key.name: task-max-concurrent
key.description: Maximum number of tasks that can run simultaneously

key.name: task-history-days
key.description: Number of days to keep task history

key.name: enable-audit-log
key.description: Log all agent actions for security auditing

key.name: require-confirmation
key.description: Require user confirmation for sensitive operations

key.name: log-retention-days
key.description: Number of days to keep security logs

key.name: llm-provider
key.description: Default LLM provider for agents

key.name: llm-model
key.description: Specific model to use with the provider

key.name: llm-base-url
key.description: Base API URL for OpenAI-compatible or local LLM providers

key.name: llm-api-key-secret-id
key.description: Secret Service item identifier for the LLM API key

key.name: llm-temperature
key.description: Temperature parameter for LLM generation

key.name: llm-max-tokens
key.description: Maximum tokens for LLM responses

key.name: system-mode
key.description: High-level operating mode for Koii OS

key.name: plugin-agent-enabled
key.description: Allow the Plugin Development Agent to generate, test, and deploy API plugins

key.name: core-settings-agent-enabled
key.description: Allow the Core Settings Agent to manage Koii OS core parameters

key.name: mode-settings-agent-enabled
key.description: Allow the Mode Settings Agent to switch Koii OS operating modes
